description: Model the life cycle inventory of wind energy by amortizing the infrastructure construction impacts using the USLCI database. Create a 'Wind Turbine Construction, 2MW' process with inputs of 150,000 kg 'Steel' and 800,000 kg 'Concrete'. Create a 'Wind Electricity Generation' process with an output of 1 kWh electricity, linking the construction process as an input based on an amortization factor for a 20-year lifetime and 4,000,000 kWh annual production. Export the inventory of the generation process to '~/LCA_Results/turbine_inventory.csv'.
